name: Implement file upload with presigned URLs
description: Develop the POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls API to allow secure document uploads for AI analysis.

name: Implement AI Sprint Generation API
description: Develop POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation with logic to parse DOCX and Excel files into sprint tasks.

name: Create UI for document upload and context input
description: Build the frontend interface for uploading files and providing additional context for the AI generator.

name: Develop Sprint preview and edit interface
description: Implement a UI table to display AI-generated tasks, allowing users to review and modify them before saving.

name: Implement Owner/Manager access control
description: Add authorization middleware to restrict AI sprint generation features to users with Owner or Manager roles.

name: Implement task status classification logic
description: Develop the backend logic to categorize tasks (DONE, LATE, SPILLOVER, etc.) based on dates and story points.

name: Develop Burndown Chart calculation engine
description: Implement the engine to calculate daily expected vs. actual burndown metrics based on completed story points.

name: Implement Sprint export to Excel API
description: Develop GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export to generate and download Excel files of the work list.

name: Integrate AI generation flow end-to-end
description: Connect the file upload, AI generation API, and preview UI into a seamless user workflow.

name: Configure automated sprint metric reporting
description: Implement formulas for calculating Total Estimated, Total Completed, and Completion Rate metrics.
